plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: Consensus code review through deliberation between Claude and Codex. Both models independently review code changes, then debate findings until they agree.

plugins.name: lsp-servers
plugins.description: LSP server configurations for rust-analyzer, clangd, sourcekit-lsp, kotlin-lsp, lua-language-server, ty, tsgo, and gleam.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Apply code review comments from .code-review.md files. Companion skill for scristobal/code-review.nvim.
